channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin hovers below $60,000 as crypto braces for a pivotal week
item.description: BTC added 0.6% to $59,800 to start the week while SOL rose 2%, though derivatives data and chart formations point to continued downside risk.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says obfuscation could unlock private onchain crypto voting
item.description: Vitalik Buterin said indistinguishability obfuscation could eventually support private, collusion-resistant onchain voting without trusted committees, though the technology remains impractical.

item.title: Ukraine Takes $8.3M in Seized Crypto Under State Management in a First
item.description: Over 8.3 million USDT seized from an alleged hacking ring has been moved to a wallet held by Ukraine's asset-recovery agency, ARMA.

item.title: Germany leads MiCA crypto authorization race as Europe’s deadline looms
item.description: MiCA crypto licensing data shows 244 approved companies across EU and EEA jurisdictions, led by Germany with France and the Netherlands also among top hubs ahead of July 1 cliff.

item.title: Europe’s unlicensed crypto firms face ‘wipeout’ as MiCA deadline hits
item.description: European regulator ESMA called on unauthorized crypto-asset service providers to wind down their businesses in an orderly manner as the MiCA transitional period ends on July 1.

item.title: BTC price RSI prints key 2026 signal: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin prepped an "interesting" RSI divergence into the Q2 and June candle close as analysis compared $60,000 to the $30,000 mark in the 2022 bear market.

item.title: Kiwoom eyes Bithumb stake as Korean brokerages push into crypto: Report
item.description: Kiwoom Securities is reportedly seeking to acquire a stake in crypto exchange Bithumb, as more brokerage firms race to secure a stake in the industry ahead of the FSC’s new regulatory reforms in July.

item.title: Bitcoin falls into a technical no man’s land as major support levels sit miles away
item.description: Bitcoin is trading below key technical and onchain valuation levels, with historical bear market patterns suggesting a potential bottom closer to $45,000.

item.title: New MiCA regime in Europe, U.S. jobs report for June: Crypto Week Ahead
item.description: Your look at what's coming in the week starting June 29.

item.title: JUST IN: Global central banks say crypto stablecoins are strengthening the dollar rather than being an alternative to fiat. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9IMEU1dWxGa0dyTlEydUZzdTRJZkRhR1NmT0tUWTVmTHRZV3VYZkJLVWJBVjFCVHZWR2ZkQjlwSW9GMUJDY3BGVTZPUHdvS01uZlFXcWhweFlQN0FJZlZOUnZB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Global central banks say …

item.title: BIS warns stablecoins are more like ETFs than actual money, and they're creating FX risk
item.description: BIS's latest annual report dives into stablecoins and AI trends.

item.title: Galaxy cuts CLARITY Act odds to 50% as Senate floor time narrows
item.description: Galaxy cut its 2026 CLARITY Act odds to 50%, warning that Senate floor time is running out before the August recess.

item.title: Bitcoin $BTC is going to zero, warns Jeremy Grantham, the man who has predicted 100 of the last 2 market crashes 🚨 🚨 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBqQXJ2dUNPeVFBS0ZlUEptZldKeG1mZTljOWRXQ1EzeGVzTVR1OW54Tmc3M2VWVkpobWttVWRZdGV3U19KVFFCb0dSVzd5MVJpSmpHRmxzdHl1YVdHSHc?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin $BTC is going to zero, warns Je…

item.title: Bitcoin’s First Bottoming Flag Has Appeared “BTC is finally showing evidence of a meaningful internal clean-up. But if history is a guide, the market may still need to absorb more stress before the bearish phase can fully exhaust itself.” – By @MorenoDV_ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBoYWhxUF9UMkdQcVhUN21JVmdLM3h6WEd1NEdlcTJTel9SXzlBYWdsTUhIcHJQeXk5TFNQd1VxYVJuclpmUW9hQkRLaWgxTzhRWmppRENwWnRrcEdLZElOMWo1dHkzMk0?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin’s First Bottoming F…

item.title: Crypto exchange BitMEX loses CEO, CFO and head of growth
item.description: The firm’s global general counsel, Peter Wilkinson, has taken over as CEO from Stephan Lutz.

item.title: South Korea’s $518 billion AI chip push shows crypto is still losing the capital race
item.description: Samsung and SK Hynix are pulling a chip-plant buildout forward by a decade to meet AI memory demand. It is the latest and largest sign of the AI capital cycle that has drawn money away from crypto all year.

item.title: Bitcoin dips to $59,700 as Iran de-escalation lifts stocks but not crypto
item.description: U.S. equity futures rose after reports the U.S. and Iran agreed to halt strikes and resume talks. Bitcoin has barely moved, still down 6.8% on the week.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Excessive AI spending risks global financial consequences, BIS warns
item.description: The AI investment surge is a potential flashpoint for systemic risk, “as financing has relied on enormous debt and highly leveraged nonbank structures that can rapidly unwind,” one analyst said in response to the report.

item.title: India’s USDT Supply Tightens as Stablecoin Premium Rises Above 8.5% According to The Economic Times, USDT supply in India has suddenly tightened, pushing the local stablecoin premium from the usual 3%–4% to over 8.5%. On Saturday, USDT was qu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE8taE52S3BlbEhqTk5KZzF3Q3ZjOUtadFY0bmktN29jR0RVdjNnTXVrdWF3WWM0akFBcklSV1hGaXNHWjdGWlBmX2lxa0FjWlR2c3RoUHpfX05tMkM2cGRzNU9WWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">India’s USDT Supply Tightens as …

item.title: $4 billion gone. Spot bitcoin ETFs are on track for their worst month on record
item.description: Investors have pulled out $4 billion from the U.S.-listed spot bitcoin ETFs in June, the highest outflow on record.

item.title: Pioneering zk-rollup Loopring closes DEX, citing lack of adoption
item.description: “We lacked a virtual machine, no composability, no real‑world payment use cases. That limitation kept our ecosystem from growing,” said the team.

item.title: Ether treasury Sharplink bought $62.4M ETH last week
item.description: Sharplink bought nearly 40,000 ETH last week after an eight-month pause, adding to signs the company has resumed its Ether accumulation strategy.

item.title: Bullish Bitcoin RSI divergence has analysts calling for 2022-style bear market bottom
item.description: Bitcoin RSI bullish divergences formed the basis for the new bull case, but some market takes warned that new BTC price lows were still to come.

item.title: Binance booted from EU, EthLabs rises up to save Ethereum: Hodler's Digest June 14-28
item.description: BitMine and Joe Lubin back a new non profit called Ethlabs that aims to spur adoption. Binance shutters services in Europe after failing to secure a license.

item.title: Early Ethereum zkRollup Pioneer Loopring to Shut Down DEX, Says zkEVM Has Overtaken Its Architecture Loopring, one of Ethereum’s earliest zkRollup projects, announced it is shutting down the Loopring DEX effective immediately, with its relayer going offli - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5NbHdjcUZGVmptekpPaW5iclhiT1p3OG5JQWRMaS1LRXVjWTlDNklUMlpPdkFmUDE2SHF6OEQtVlBSbGNzNExNQ24xdEFSWDBETmR4MHFfX3FPcUItV0RFYU9MVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Early Ethereum zkRollup Pioneer …

item.title: CZ wants to make the U.S. the 'capital of crypto': State of Crypto
item.description: The Binance founder shared his views on a variety of topics in an exclusive interview with CoinDesk earlier this month.

item.title: BIS warns stablecoins risk fragmenting global financial system
item.description: The Basel-based institution said that private digital tokens fall short of the requirements for sound money and urged policymakers to accelerate work on tokenized forms of central bank and commercial bank money.

item.title: I'm really keen to see what #Bitcoin will do when it breaks back above $61K. It would strengthen the thesis of the bullish divergence and the markets can target the $65K resistance (and old support of the range) as the next target zone. The fact that the markets - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBXc29FcjBnWG92VnpvS2Q3dVdWZWpFZWFYc2VRSDdOakFLYWduR2hQZm4wbUlpTkF5OV9NYWJiZXh2ZU5zc0tLRno5SWUtMUhycWNtMkZnT3phU0FjUWppQThFNA?oc=5" target="_blank">I'm really keen to see what #Bit…

item.title: Will Bitcoin price recover in July?
item.description: Bitcoin’s past July gains and heavy short bets point to a rally toward $75,000, but a break below key support keeps the risk of $55,000 in play.

item.title: EU watchdog EBA details big crypto fines as landmark laws bite
item.description: The European Banking Authority laid out a proposed penalty framework on Friday that can strip non-compliant significant token issuers of up to 12.5% of their annual revenue.

item.title: LATEST: 📈 Arthur Hayes says he'd pick Ethereum over Bitcoin right now if forced to invest in just one, based purely on their charts. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE40ZmlHc1RmR2FKaGZReDBYX292Y2FBeTAzUEpJaEtDM2dLMVdGcjYxSi0wcTFqSEZVaGZwSk54enRfZ0NwZjVCREN1QXJBZjBURDh2bDEzZnpNTWR6MGh5T0NYdHQ?oc=5" target="_blank">LATEST: 📈 Arthur Hayes says he…

item.title: Over $1 trillion worth of Bitcoin has been sitting dormant—until now Built for institutions holding idle Bitcoin, Hashi from Sui $SUI @SuiNetwork removes the barriers so they can participate in Bitcoin DeFi without the usual constraints. Join Grayscale's Head of - x.com

item.title: Samson Mow says bitcoin bottom is in despite skepticism from analysts
item.description: The bitcoin advocate said his crypto bottom claim is based on the fact that the traditional four-year halving cycle has changed, although several analysts continue to expect further downside.

item.title: Michael Saylor teases more bitcoin buying even as Strategy stock continues to fall
item.description: The crypto bull shrugged off market skepticism by sharing a chart of the company's $50 billion stash and teasing that they are going to need more data points.

item.title: SBI's $289 million Bitbank deal is symptomatic of Japan's crypto consolidation: Architect Partners
item.description: The investment bank said the purchase of Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank is a bet on regulated scale as sweeping reforms reshape the country's digital asset market.

item.title: Just back from the Philippines. One of the most exciting digital asset markets in SEA right now, jumping to 4th globally in TRM Labs' Country Crypto Adoption Index. Their regulators get it. Collaborative, forward-thinking, focused on outcomes: consumer protecti - x.com

item.title: The Future Cyberpunk Imagined Is Here: How Much Did It Get Right?
item.description: From AI to brain implants, cyberpunk got more right than many people realize. Its biggest prediction, however, wasn't the technology.

item.title: Crypto's next frontier isn't crypto, it's financing AI and robotics, Framework's Anderson says
item.description: Blockchain is becoming the financial layer for capital-intensive industries rather than just crypto-native speculation, Michael Anderson, the crypto venture firm's cofounder, said.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints that Strategy bought more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9pVWF1Y3NndlpGUjJJYldvYW10UkV4WXJpYzZGTXNhTk1FWTBpcHBua21xeGw0TmZLMnhzWXIzMU13aDNiaEVTMmp5OG5WZWszQVIyajdrenpFQWY1WE5FeUZ0UEZEODQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: Binance posts over $400M in weekly net outflows as MiCA deadline nears
item.description: Early exchange flow data show no clear signs of a mass migration from Binance ahead of the EU MiCA transition deadline, despite rivals' efforts to attract users.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "We're gonna need more charts." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBqanVjc1BDNTA4MzhrdXBrc2piNFpoT3lfM19QaFFPYmZPZlJFTWVxQ1BOc3NUVUY3clcwSjAzdlVpa2FzTE1UeTlqYk5GdGhBd0ZWVk9JQVZDSG1STHJRc3FB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Grayscale's Pandl says Strategy should sell $3B Bitcoin to restore confidence
item.description: Grayscale's research head Zach Pandl said Strategy should sell $3 billion in Bitcoin to cover its cash obligations, but CryptoQuant argued the company has other ways to support STRC.

item.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss
item.description: The token is down nearly 7% on the week with the altcoins falling harder. Bitcoin and ether are both ending the second quarter in the red, a back-to-back losing first half that runs against the usual pattern.

item.title: Base says sequencer bug caused back-to-back outages
item.description: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

item.title: Bitcoin UXTOs signal capitulation underway: Analyst
item.description: “These periods have always been profitable for long-term investors,” said CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost.

item.title: ⚡ WDYT: Billionaire Jeremy Grantham says Bitcoin will fade away "with a whimper". since 2013, over 400 news stories and posts have said something similar. What do you think? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9QdWtaSmFwYlJDNWRfdXJPRlJCMWxtLW43c191VU1fSHFPdmZ3dmIzYV9QWkhCaHZOVUJnSEo0Y0tvX2EtTDZWdEp6VUVpVFZ6eHJubzV0MWtyTFI3QXJUemg5Mzg?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡ WDYT: Billionaire Jeremy Gran…

item.title: Fidelity rebuts claims Bitcoin becomes less secure after halvings
item.description: The asset manager argues Bitcoin's fixed supply schedule does not undermine network security, even as miners face shrinking block rewards after each halving.

item.title: Bitcoin faces fresh capitulation risk as 50K BTC moved at a loss
item.description: Nearly 50,000 BTC shifted to exchanges at a loss while short-term Bitcoin holders' stress level reached 2-year highs. Is BTC headed toward new lows?

item.title: Bitcoin (-31%) and Gold (-6%) are the two worst performing major assets so far in 2026. This is something we haven't seen before in any calendar year. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE16M0F0MDlSZEczQ1QxNE5lbFU0S18wZzJiLTdJYlpuQjRTVXJueU82Vk9INDFCQ25oTUUzdm5YTF9qRjQ5R2V6OWQyUnM3VWZibVFrVmVKRlMyVnQtbTAxNFZ1aDhkdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin (-31%) and Gold (-6%…

item.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
item.description: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.

item.title: The Stablecoin Founder Map Doesn't Match the Stablecoin Volume Map
item.description: Emerging markets drive most real-world stablecoin usage, yet founder concentration and venture funding remain U.S.- and Europe-centric.

item.title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
item.description: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.

item.title: Retail investors appear to be rotating out of gold and Bitcoin into semiconductor stocks: Since April, US gold and Bitcoin ETFs have posted -$12 billion in cumulative outflows. Over the same period, US semiconductor ETFs have attracted +$20 billion in cumulat - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBQbS1WQ2l2U2ZZYlY2aUtyZEtwZE1HZXQwaFJxdjZvUGtpZ0NDOENlVzIyRXBocUdNdC1TdWttaW1XN3JZZkJLTm9iOWdTa1RjblhhMnBqRU5yZ1hVU2Q2TzUxQkl4dw?oc=5" target="_blank">Retail investors appear to b…

item.title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
item.description: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.

item.title: Billionaire Jeremy Grantham Dismisses Bitcoin, Says Crypto Will Fade 'With a Whimper'
item.description: The seasoned investor has little faith in Bitcoin's staying power, expecting crypto to quietly fade away over time.

item.title: Polymarket hack updated to $3.1 million days after the platform promised users full refunds
item.description: The prediction markets giant is under investigation in connection with false or deceptive marketing practices, according to news reports.

item.title: Coinbase and OKX try to lure in Binance’s EU users after it failed to secure a MiCA license
item.description: Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and Star Xu of OKX offered new users sign up bonuses of up to 8% of their deposits or transfers from other accounts.

item.title: WHY DID BITCOIN CRASH? Bitcoin crashes are a recurring feature of crypto markets. From leverage cascades to macro shocks, BTC drawdowns can have a major impact across the industry. Our research team broke down why Bitcoin crashes happen and ho - x.com

item.title: Capital outflows from less stable countries around the world will light another fire under bitcoin and other digital assets. AI has launched a technology revolution, deservedly sucking a lot of oxygen out of the investment world, but it cannot serve as the insuranc - x.com
